pi_items.source: Verified from scripts/task_utils.sh where MUNCIE_DIR is set to this path.
Verified from setup_task.sh where RESULTS_DIR is explicitly created at this path.
Verified from export_result.sh where AGENT_CSV points to this expected path.
Verified from verifier.py where 'req_cols' specifies exactly these columns.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the HEC-RAS Muncie example dataset (a section of the White River in Muncie, Indiana), which is real data. The project directory is confirmed as /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie, and results must be written to /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/channel_shape_analysis.csv. The output CSV must include specific required columns (River_Station, Peak_WSE, Flow_Area, Top_Width, Hydraulic_Depth, Max_Depth, Shape_Factor, Classification), directly matching the grading criteria in verifier.py.
